SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-26-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-26-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER---JAMES CHAI. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---WING-CHEON FUNG. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-26-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HANG, ANNIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YE, LISA DBA (BEAUTY SENSATION) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
